name: Vinings Holdings Inc.
summary: Vinings Holdings Inc., a biopharmaceutical company, engages in the acquisition, development, and commercialization of branded and generic pharmaceutical products. Its portfolio consists two approved drugs and two clinical stage drugs. The company offers conjupri, for the treatment of hypertension; consensi, non steroidal anti inflammatory drug for the treatment of pain caused by osteoarthritis; and amlodipine besylate to treat hypertension. It additionally has CPT15050, CPT60621 drugs in clinical stage. The company has partnership with Burke Therapeutics for sales, marketing, distribution, contracting, and pricing for conjupri. The company was incorporated in 2018 and is based in Wexford, Pennsylvania.
